name: oid-knowledge-lab
description: Responsible OID knowledge-base crawler and analysis workspace.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/ianaPen.js && node --check src/manifest.js && node --check src/net.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check src/report.js && node --check src/site.js && node --check src/robots.js && node --check src/sitemap.js && node --check tests/oidKnowledge.test.js
scripts.build:site: node src/cli.js build-site --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --out public
scripts.audit:dataset: node src/cli.js audit-dataset --sitemap reports/oid-base-sitemap-index.json --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --out reports/dataset-manifest.json
scripts.refresh:publishable: npm run export:sitemap-index && npm run import:iana-pen && node src/cli.js build-site --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --sitemap reports/oid-base-sitemap-index.json --out public && npm run audit:dataset
scripts.import:iana-pen: node src/cli.js import-iana-pen --out data/iana --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --public-index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json
scripts.audit:local: npm run check && npm test && npm run build:site
